key.name: show-indicator
key.summary: Show the multi-panel indicator on the main panel
key.description: Enable or disable the legacy indicator entry on the primary panel.

key.name: show-panel
key.summary: Show the bar on additional monitors
key.description: Enable or disable the multi-panel bar on non-primary monitors.

key.name: show-activities
key.description: Control whether the Activities button is shown on secondary-monitor bars.

key.name: show-app-menu
key.summary: Show the app menu on additional monitors
key.description: Control whether the focused application's menu is shown on secondary-monitor bars.

key.name: show-date-time
key.summary: Show date and time on additional monitors
key.description: Control whether the clock and date menu are shown on secondary-monitor bars.

key.name: thumbnails-slider-position
key.summary: Show thumbnails slider on additional monitors
key.description: Preserved compatibility setting for the legacy overview thumbnails feature.

key.name: available-indicators
key.description: Internal cache of indicators that can be mirrored or transferred. This key is maintained automatically.

key.name: transfer-indicators
key.description: Mapping of indicator role names to target monitor indexes for indicators moved off the primary bar.

key.name: indicator-order
key.description: Visual order for stable indicators shown on the multi-panel bar.

key.name: indicator-positions
key.description: Mapping of stable indicators to their target group on the multi-panel bar: left, center, or right.

key.name: hidden-indicators
key.description: Stable indicators that should be hidden on the multi-panel bar.

key.name: indicator-padding
key.description: Mapping of stable indicators to extra horizontal padding in pixels on the multi-panel bar.

key.name: indicator-gap
key.description: Gap in pixels between indicators on the multi-panel bar.

key.name: quick-settings-gap
key.description: Gap in pixels between copied Quick Settings items on the multi-panel bar.

key.name: apply-indicator-layout-to-main-panel
key.summary: Apply indicator layout to main panel
key.description: Apply indicator internal padding and gap settings to the main panel as well.

key.name: exclude-indicators
key.description: Indicators in this list are ignored by transfer and mirroring logic.

key.name: screenshot-on-all-monitors
key.summary: Show screenshot tools on all monitors
key.description: Show the screenshot controls on every monitor instead of only the monitor under the pointer.
